message:
fix(merge): resolve MVCC, arc_cache, and VDBE engine merge conflicts

Resolve three-way merge conflicts in concurrent development branches:

- begin_concurrent.rs: Reconcile divergent MVCC begin-concurrent
  transaction initialization paths (40 lines changed)
- arc_cache.rs: Merge competing arc cache eviction policy updates
  and capacity tracking improvements (76 lines changed)
- engine.rs: Integrate parallel VDBE engine enhancements including
  opcode dispatch and register management changes (227 lines changed)

All conflict resolutions preserve both sides' improvements where
possible, preferring the more complete implementation when they
directly overlap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
